leadText: If you were looking for the character of the day who appeared in Luxray Vision!, see Marble (DP059). If you were looking for the character of the day who appeared in Crisis at Ferroseed Research! with the Japanese name of Professor Marble, see Professor Malveaux. The Marble (Japanese: ビーだま Marble) is a valuable item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Marble serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A round glass marble. You can see colored glass inside the transparent marble.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A marble with colored glass inside. Your buddy was probably drawn to its intricate pattern.
